sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 114:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 114:1
items.html: The vessel is the self of ZA since it is the fourth edge, opposite ZA of the five phases. Its light is the phase of VAK from the self of the light of ZA, which is the light of Tifferet. After the light of Tifferet concealed in its root, in Gevura, Tifferet gave its VAK to Netzah, as it is written in answer 155. (Inner Light, Item‎ 42)
